query: SELECT ci.cfProjectId, ci.name, ci.category, ci.fundingSource, ci.escrowEligible FROM cf_cost_items ci WHERE ci.cfProjectId IN (90001, 90002, 90003) ORDER BY ci.cfProjectId, ci.sortOrder LIMIT 20 OFFSET 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT ci.cfProjectId, ci.name, ci.category, ci.fundingSource, ci.escrowEligible FROM cf_cost_items ci WHERE ci.cfProjectId IN (90001, 90002, 90003) ORDER BY ci.cfProjectId, ci.sortOrder LIMIT 20 OFFSET 20;
